title: Babcock & Wilcox gets green light for $2.4bn AI-dedicated power plant
description: Babcock & Wilcox said it has received final approval to build a $2.4bn power plant to supply Applied Digital's artificial intelligence campuses. The announcement sent the stock up about 22% at the...
content:
Babcock & Wilcox said it has received final approval to build a $2.4bn power plant to supply Applied Digital's artificial intelligence campuses. The announcement sent the stock up about 22% at the opening bell on Wall Street.

title: Gloucestershire farmer relying on AI to monitor his herd
description: A Gloucestershire farmer says he uses artificial intelligence to monitor the behaviour of his cows.
content:
A cattle farmer said he is not sure his farm would be able to run without artificial intelligence (AI) because of the insight the technology provides into his herd's behaviour.

title: Reports of AI-generated child sexual abuse material surge
description: Reports of artificial intelligence-generated child sexual abuse material (CSAM) skyrocketed from 4,700 in 2023 to more than 400,000 in just the first half of 2025, according to the National Center for Missing and Exploited Children.
